description: User describes classic post-traumatic patterns (intrusion, avoidance, hypervigilance) from a past event. Should recommend trauma path with rationale grounded in their specific words.

rationaleMustReference: noises OR jump OR startle OR avoid
expectedQualities.notes: Clear single-path signal in trauma direction. Trauma must be in the recommendations. Rationale must reference the specific intake language about nightmares, jumping, or avoidance. Autism and ADHD should not be recommended. A second recommendation is acceptable if cleanly justified (e.g., anxiety due to hypervigilance overlap), but trauma is the must-have.

payload.intakeText: Something happened to me about two years ago that I keep reliving. I have nightmares about it most weeks. I avoid the street where it happened. I jump at sudden loud noises. My body feels like it is constantly braced for something.
